title: Area Effect Clouds 3D
description: Replace those flat Area Effect Clouds with new 3D version of them
body:
## Summary

Area Effect Cloud 3D is a simple mod that replaces vanilla's flat Area Effect Clouds with spherical versions of them.

## The mod

All the generated clouds are replaced with the 3D version of them. Can be disabled in the config.

This was part of [InsaneLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/insanelib)

## Modpack Permissions

Go on.
